title: YOUTH PROGRAMS - 211info
text: URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND YOUTH PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers youth programs with interactive academic and real-world experiences that build leadership, life, and social skills, self-esteem, and cultural pride. Programs are designed to prepare students for success, encouraging post-secondary education and professional careers. Services include scholarship listings, job readiness training, employment support, and internship opportunities. Eligibility: Ages 12-25. Focuses on serving the African American community and additional communities of color. Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 280-2600 Main phone Main phone (503) 280-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Camps * African American Community Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * African American Community Job Training Formats * African American Community Leadership Development * African American Community Student Financial Aid * African American Community Youth Employment Programs * African American Community Youth Enrichment Programs * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALTH HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
